content.en:
Xuanwu Mountain.

Several fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Jiuyang Sea led many high-level immeasurable lifeforms to surround Xuanwu Mountain, and used the Supreme Treasure to seal the time and space around Xuanwu Mountain.

"True Wind Ancestor, what are you going to do in Jiuyang Sea?"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor looked through the magic circle, looked at one of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms outside the magic circle, and asked.

"Xuanxin Great Ancestor, let go of Xuanwu Mountain, this place belongs to our Jiuyang Sea!"

True Wind Great Ancestor said in a commanding tone.

"True Wind Great Ancestor, Xuanwu Mountain is the place of our Xuanqi Pavilion, please leave!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor was calm on the surface, but he was panicked in his heart, after all, several fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms sent by Jiuyang Sea were very powerful, and the most powerful of them was this True Wind Great Ancestor, who had already completed four full-body tempering, and his strength was above him.

Even if Xuanwu Mountain is blessed by the magic array, it can't stop the attacks of these great ancestors!

Time passed little by little, and Xuanxin Great Ancestor still did not choose to give up Xuanwu Mountain.

Seeing this, the True Wind Great Ancestor and the others no longer wasted time and directly chose to attack.

Bang!!!!

A Venerable Great Ancestor launched an attack, and they all hit the magic circle of Xuanwu Mountain.

In an instant, the surrounding time and space shattered, and the magic circle was also cracked.

Not long after, the magic circles were shattered, and the True Wind Great Ancestor and them directly entered the Xuanwu Mountain.

"Xuanwu Mountain can't be saved!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor knew very well that with the current strength of Xuanqi Pavilion, there was no way to recapture Xuanwu Mountain.

So, he directly destroyed this treasure land, even if he lost it, he couldn't leave it to Jiuyang Sea!

He reached out and grabbed it, and took the blood of the gods.

Due to the limited time, he could not take all the resources in the treasure land with him.

"The veins of the immeasurable blood gold stone have been destroyed!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor struck a hard blow at the core of the ore vein, and regardless of whether or not he destroyed the immeasurable blood gold stone vein, he directly chose to escape.

However.

Xuanxin Great Ancestor's behavior still angered the Great Ancestor of Jiuyang Sea.

"Xuanxin Great Ancestor, you are looking for death!"

True Wind Great Ancestor and they directly killed them and intercepted Xuanxin Great Ancestor.

Thundered!!!!

The battle between the high-level immeasurable lifeforms belonging to the fourth stage began.

Almost in between breaths, Xuanxin Great Ancestor was hit hard.

After all, his strength is much weaker than that of the True Wind Great Ancestor, and it is still one-to-many, how can he fight?

Soon, Xuanxin Great Ancestor was on the verge of death.

"True Wind Ancestor, do you really dare to kill me?"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor said in fear.

"What if I killed you, you Xuanqi Pavilion still dare to jump now?"

True Wind Great Ancestor sneered.

Today's Xuanqi Pavilion has lost the qualification to compete with Jiuyang Sea.

If it weren't for the fact that Xuanqi Mountain's magic circle was too powerful, otherwise Jiuyang Hai would directly dare to bulldoze Xuanqi Mountain.

Therefore, he killed Xuanxin Great Ancestor, and Xuanqi Pavilion didn't dare to do anything.

"Die!"

The True Wind Great Ancestor used an immeasurable extreme domain technique, directly penetrating the body of the Xuanxin Great Ancestor, completely erasing its last vitality.

After killing the Xuanxin Great Ancestor, the True Wind Great Ancestor and the others struck again, killing the Great Ancestor of Xuanqi Pavilion in Xuanwu Mountain.

In an instant, Xuanwu Mountain was completely occupied by Jiuyang Sea.

......

Genki Pavilion.

The Xuanwu Great Ancestor soon knew about the situation in Xuanwu Mountain, and the fall of the Great Ancestor made them extremely distressed, those were the backbone of the Xuanqi Pavilion!

And with the fall of the Xuanxin Great Ancestor, they were completely furious.

"The Xuanxin Great Ancestor has fallen, and Xuanwu Mountain has been taken away by Jiuyang Sea!"

The Xuanwu Great Ancestor announced the tragic news.

"Xuanwu Pavilion Master, you can't go on like this anymore, otherwise Jiuyang Sea will become more and more excessive. Moreover, there are already other forces that have followed Jiuyang Sea to encroach on many of our territories. We have to do something to let the other forces know that our Xuanqi Pavilion is not so easy to bully!"

"We must take revenge on Jiuyang Hai, the fall of the Xuanxin Great Ancestor can't just be forgotten!"

"If the Xuanxin Great Ancestor falls, we won't do anything, maybe it won't be long before we will die at the hands of Jiuyang Hai!"

At this time, a Great Ancestor proposed, "Xuanwu Pavilion Lord, use that thing!"

As soon as he heard that thing, the Xuanqi Pavilion Lord sighed slightly: "I really want to use the Xuanqi Armor, we Xuanqi Pavilion currently only have the last Origin Golden Crystal left! Once this Origin Golden Crystal is exhausted, we will no longer be able to urge the Xuanqi Armor, this is the last hole card left to us by the Xuanqi Heavenly Ancestor!"

"Xuanwu Pavilion Master, as long as we don't say it, Jiuyang Sea and the other forces don't know that we only have the last Origin Golden Crystal left in Xuanqi Pavilion!

"Yes, if the Xuanqi armor doesn't use it, then it's an ornament, and it must be revealed. Only by revealing the Xuanqi Armor, then our Xuanqi Pavilion still has the combat power of the fifth stage high-level immeasurable lifeform level!"

After the narration and persuasion of these great ancestors, the master of the Xuanwu Pavilion decided to use the Xuanqi armor.

Immediately, they went to the depths of Xuanqi Mountain, took out the Xuanqi armor, and took out an Origin Golden Crystal from the treasure house.

Then, they placed the Origin Golden Crystal on the Xuanqi Armor Warrior and activated the Xuanqi Armor Warrior.

And when Xuanqi Pavilion urged Xuanqi Jiashi, the Jiuyang Great Ancestor of Jiuyang Sea had already left Xuanqi Mountain and returned to Jiuyang Sea.

For Jiuyanghai, it was enough to capture a Xuanwu Mountain.

Therefore, there is no need for Jiuyang Great Ancestor to stay here.

Soon.

Xuanwu Great Ancestor and they walked out of Xuanqi Mountain with Xuanqi Jiashi, and when they saw Jiuyang Great Ancestor leaving, they went directly to Jiuyang Sea.

They decided to invade the Jiuyang Sea, even if they couldn't destroy the Jiuyang Sea, they had to let the Jiuyang Sea be severely damaged, so as to avenge the fall of the Xuanxin Great Ancestor.

Rumble!!!!

Many of the great ancestors of Xuanqi Pavilion went to Jiuyang Sea, and this scene attracted the attention of many great ancestors, and they all went over to see the excitement.

......

"Xuanqi Pavilion's Pavilion Master, Xuanwu Great Ancestor, has gone to Jiuyang Sea?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

Xuanqi Pavilion's Xuanwu Mountain was taken away, and Xuanqi Pavilion also lost a fourth-stage Xuanxin Great Ancestor, how dare you argue with Jiuyang Sea now?

"Interesting, it seems that Xuanqi Pavilion has used its hole cards, could it be that this hole card can compete with the fifth stage of the Jiuyang Great Ancestor?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he prepared to go over to see the excitement.

Swish!

Ye Tian left from the ruins stone tower and also went to Jiuyang Sea.

At the same time, many of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the forces went over to watch the excitement, but they definitely did not participate in it.
